# Pure quadratic equation

## Short Teaching Summary
Pure quadratic equation: A Pure Quadratic Equation has no linear term (b = 0), for example, 4x² – 36 = 0. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
